candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but it is a generic total D&A row and not specifically tied to COGS/cost of inventories. Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Cost of inventories'. The visible D&A row is a standalone operating line, not labelled as COGS/COR-related D&A, so it should not be added to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A row above EBIT at the same level as the selected SG&A-like components. The selected XSGA bucket explicitly excluded D&A, and no more granular SG&A/R&D D&A rows are shown, so this summary row is the best separate add-back for operating overhead D&A.

variables.notes: Use the summary D&A row once for XSGA_DA. No dedicated R&D expense row is present, and no bucket-specific D&A split is shown.
